utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items required in the format: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown). In the final package, all 7 items appear. Check full specification: destination provided; travel_dates provided with specific dates; transportation includes type and cost but lacks specific flight details (airline, times) though minimally present—format asks for flight details with costs; accommodation has name, type, and cost—sufficient; activities list names and costs—sufficient; additional_services has description and cost—sufficient; total_budget gives a single figure but not a detailed breakdown—however individual line costs are present in other fields enabling an implicit breakdown. The stricter reading requires the transportation flight details to be more specific and total_budget to include an explicit breakdown. Given the provided package: transportation is under-specified; total_budget as a single number without explicit breakdown may be considered insufficient. Thus included items fully specified: destination (1), travel_dates (2), accommodation (3), activities (4), additional_services (5). Transportation not fully specified (missing detailed flight info). Total_budget not fully specified as a breakdown. So 5 out of 7.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package: destination is 'Prague, Czech Republic' which matches a destination rating. Transportation is 'Flights (Paris to Prague, Round Trip, Economy Class)' which corresponds to 'standard_airlines' -> 'Economy Class'. Accommodation is 'Tranquil Inn' which has a direct rating. Activities listed are 'City Walking Tour', 'Prague Zoo Visit', and 'Science Museum for Kids'. In ground truth, the closest matches are 'City Walking Tour', 'Zoo', and 'Science Museum for kids' (case variation). Additional services are an allowance line without a corresponding rated service, so no mapping for that. Total budget has no rating.
